title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 272.360 - Provisions of law effective after election
text:
272.360.  Provisions of law effective after election. — The provisions of sections 272.210 to 272.370 are hereby suspended in the several counties of this state until a majority of the legal voters of any county voting on the question at any general or special election called for that purpose shall decide to enforce the same in the county.
(L. 1963 p. 401 § 16)
